name: Fritzy Tech Inc.
summary: Fritzy Tech Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to launch Zshoppers.com and homekout.com brands. The company was formerly known as First Priority Tax Solutions Inc. and changed its name to Fritzy Tech Inc. in December 2019. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in London, the United Kingdom. Fritzy Tech Inc. is a subsidiary of Silverlight International Limited.
